meta.description: Golden tests for realized variance estimators (Parkinson, Garman-Klass)

extra.parkinson_reference: Parkinson, M. (1980). 'The Extreme Value Method for Estimating the Variance of the Rate of Return.' Journal of Business, 53(1), 61-65.
extra.garman_klass_reference: Garman, M. B., & Klass, M. J. (1980). 'On the Estimation of Security Price Volatilities from Historical Data.' Journal of Business, 53(1), 67-78.

case_meta.notes: Two-day data with H/L ratios of 1.1 and 1.2. Formula: σ² = [1/(4·ln(2))] · (1/n) · Σ[ln(H/L)]²

annualized_variance.notes: Hand-calculated: ln(1.1)=0.0953, ln(1.2)=0.1823, sum_sq=0.0423, factor=0.3607, daily=0.00764, annual=1.924
Hand-calculated: Day1 contrib=0.00982, Day2 contrib=0.00893, daily=0.009375, annual=2.362
